title: Production Confirmation
learning_objectives: Understand Production Confirmation in SAP PP.
Learn why Production Confirmation is performed.
Understand operation confirmation and final confirmation.
Learn important Production Confirmation transaction codes.
Understand how Production Confirmation updates SAP.

introduction.title: What is Production Confirmation?
introduction.content: Production Confirmation is the process of recording manufacturing activities after production operations are completed. It informs SAP about the quantity produced, processing time consumed, labor hours, machine hours and production status. Confirmation provides real-time visibility of production progress.

business_purpose.title: Why is Production Confirmation Important?
business_purpose.content: Production Confirmation updates production progress, consumes planned capacities, records actual production time, supports production costing and prepares the order for Goods Receipt. Without confirmation, SAP cannot accurately monitor shop floor execution.

confirmation_types.description: Confirmation for a single manufacturing operation.
Only part of the planned production quantity is confirmed.
Confirms completion of all production operations.
Confirmation generated automatically based on system configuration.

step_by_step_procedure: Enter Confirmation Date and Posting Date.
Record Machine Time and Labor Time.
Select Final Confirmation if production is complete.
system_updates: Machine and labor hours are recorded.
Production progress becomes visible in SAP.

integration.purpose: Production completion may trigger quality inspection.

business_example.title: Example
business_example.content: A Production Order for 1,000 stainless steel coils has completed the rolling operation. The production supervisor uses CO11N to confirm the completed quantity, records machine hours and labor hours, updates scrap quantity if any, and performs Final Confirmation after production is completed.

best_practices: Use Final Confirmation only after all operations are complete.
important_notes: Production Confirmation records actual shop floor activity.
Final Confirmation indicates that all planned operations are complete.
Cancelled confirmations should be processed using CO13 before re-confirmation.
jsl_notes: Production Confirmation should be completed immediately after shop floor execution.
Verify production quantities before posting confirmations.
Follow plant-specific approval procedures before Final Confirmation.
